title: Ubiquiti UDW - UniFi Dream Wall
description: Dream Wall is another in the range of UniFi All-in-one devices. It contains a gateway with a firewall, Wi-Fi 6 access point, NVR and a switch with PoE function. The unit provides a wide range of network connectivity options. It offers the option of connecting via a 10Gbps SFP+ port or a 2.5Gbps Ethernet port . For connecting other devices in the LAN, it offers a 10Gbps SFP+ port together with 17 Ethernet 1Gbps ports , of which 12 have PoE functionality (4x POE++, 4x POE+ and 4x POE). From the… The radio part supports the latest WiFi 6 (802.11ax) standard, is backward compatible with older standards and has MIMO 2x2 (2.4 Ghz) and 4x4 (5 GHz) with a maximum modulation speed 300 + 2400 Mbps All important information about the device and the network can be accessed immediately thanks to the integrated display with a diagonal of 4.7". The pre-installed 512GB microSD card is used for storing camera recordings, and the device also has own SSD disk with a capacity of 128GB UniFi Network Controller UniFi Protect UniFi Access UniFi Talk UniFi Connect Zero Handoff Roaming - uninterrupted transition between individual APs Wireless uplink (suitable where it is impossible to get a data cable) Up to 4 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balance - maintaining an even load / switching clients Speed limiting for each SSID Device with pre-installed 512GB microSD card Screws and dowels Drilling template Wall mount Power cord
